title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India Global Group in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India Global Group:
Becton Dickinson India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India Global Group!
